name: dropdown-menu
title: Dropdown Menu
description: A contextual menu triggered by a button. Supports items, checkboxes, radio groups, separators, and sub-menus.
a11y: The trigger must have an accessible label.
Arrow keys navigate menu items; Escape closes the menu.
All keyboard interactions are handled by Radix UI.

do: Use for actions contextual to a specific item (e.g. row actions in a table).
Keep menus short — more than 7 items should be reconsidered as a different pattern.
dont: Don't use a dropdown menu as a select input — use a Select component instead.
Don't put destructive actions as the first item — place them last, separated.
